name: AgentBrew: Lifelong Knowledge Brewing from Strong Teachers to Weak LLM Agents
summary: arXiv:2607.16851v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Deploying LLM agents typically requires a compact test-time student, even if a stronger teacher is available during training. We study knowledge brew...
description: arXiv:2607.16851v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Deploying LLM agents typically requires a compact test-time student, even if a stronger teacher is available during training. We study knowledge brewing: distilling a teacher's interactive experience into a persistent external memory for the student. Crucially, this requires no weight updates, expert demonstrations, ground-truth labels, or test-ti...
author: Yangqin Jiang, Chao Huang
